name: Nintendo Switch Joy-Con Charging Grip
notes: 170-byte Joy-Con HID descriptor (firmware-family analog, not a direct 0x200E capture). The real Grip hosts two Joy-Con HID interfaces (one per slot) over USB, each speaking Joy-Con protocol; this profile collapses that into a single single-interface virtual with the standard Joy-Con descriptor. Linux hid-nintendo.c groups the Grip under jc_type_is_joycon, confirming it shares Joy-Con framing rather than Pro Controller framing. Replace with a direct 0x200E per-interface capture when available.
